info.name: Blog API Collection - Complete
info.description: Complete collection for testing Blog and Category Blog API endpoints with Laravel Repository Pattern. Includes authentication, all CRUD operations, and sample data.

item.name: Authentication

exec: console.log('✓ User registered - Email verification required');

request.description: Register a new user account with complete profile. Email verification required.
Verify email with token from registration response. Replace TOKEN_HERE with verification token from register response.
Request password reset link. Check email for reset token.
Reset password with token from forgot-password response. Replace TOKEN_HERE with actual reset token.
Login with email and password to get authentication token
Get information about the currently authenticated user
Logout and invalidate the current token

item.description: Authentication endpoints for user registration, login, and token management

item.name: Category Blog API

request.description: Get all blog categories from the database with full details
Get only active blog categories (status = true)
Get a specific category by ID. Replace '1' with the actual category ID
Get a specific category by slug. Available slugs: teknologi, bisnis, lifestyle, pendidikan
Create a new blog category. The ID will be stored in category_id variable.
Update an existing category. Uses category_id variable (can be changed manually)
Delete a category by ID. Uses category_id variable

item.description: Complete CRUD operations for blog categories including create, read, update, and delete

item.name: Blog API

request.description: Get all blog posts from the database with category information
Search blogs by title, slug, or short description

query.description: Sort field: created_at, updated_at, title, id

request.description: Filter blogs with multiple criteria, sorting, and pagination support
Get only active blog posts (status = true)
Get blogs marked as hot news and active (for featured content)
Get all blogs in a specific category by category ID. Replace '1' with actual category ID
Get a blog post by its slug (URL-friendly identifier)
Get a specific blog post by ID. Replace '1' with actual blog ID

exec: console.log('✓ Blog created with ID: ' + response.data.blog.id);

formdata.description: Blog cover image (JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP) - Max 2MB - Optional

formdata.value: 10 Tips Memulai Bisnis Digital di Era Modern
Panduan lengkap untuk pemula yang ingin memulai bisnis digital dengan strategi yang tepat dan efektif.

Dalam era digital ini, banyak peluang bisnis yang dapat dimanfaatkan. Artikel ini akan membahas 10 tips penting untuk memulai bisnis digital Anda. Dari memilih niche yang tepat, membuat strategi pemasaran, hingga cara menggunakan media sosial secara efektif. Kami juga akan membahas tentang pentingnya konsistensi dan kesabaran dalam membangun bisnis digital. Semua ini dilengkapi dengan contoh-contoh nyata dari pengusaha sukses di Indonesia.

formdata.description: Slug URL (required) - unique, no spaces, lowercase

formdata.value: 10 Tips Memulai Bisnis Digital - Panduan Lengkap 2025
Pelajari 10 tips penting untuk memulai bisnis digital Anda. Strategi efektif dari para ahli untuk sukses di era modern.

request.description: Create a new blog post with optional cover image upload. Use form-data to upload image and other fields. Category ID 2 is 'Bisnis'. Blog ID will be stored in blog_id variable.

formdata.description: New blog cover image (JPEG, PNG, GIF, WebP) - Max 2MB - Optional

formdata.value: 15 Tips Memulai Bisnis Digital di Era Modern (Updated)
Panduan terbaru dan paling lengkap untuk pemula yang ingin memulai bisnis digital dengan strategi winning.

Update versi terbaru dengan 15 tips eksklusif untuk memulai bisnis digital. Kami telah menambahkan tips-tips baru berdasarkan feedback dari ribuan pembaca. Panduan ini mencakup strategi terbaru di tahun 2025 termasuk AI dan automation untuk bisnis digital Anda.
15 Tips Memulai Bisnis Digital 2025 - Edisi Terbaru
Update terbaru: 15 tips memulai bisnis digital dengan strategi AI dan automation untuk maksimal profit.

request.description: Update an existing blog post with optional cover image upload. Old cover will be automatically deleted if new image is uploaded. Uses form-data for file upload.
Delete a blog post by ID. Uses blog_id variable

item.description: Complete CRUD operations for blog posts with advanced filtering, search, sorting, and pagination

request.description: Get all products from the database

exec: console.log('✓ Product created with ID: ' + response.data.id);

body.raw:
{
    "name": "Laptop Gaming Pro",
    "slug": "laptop-gaming-pro",
    "is_freeshiping": "ACTIVE",
    "product_description": "Laptop gaming dengan performa tinggi",
    "product_information": "Spesifikasi lengkap laptop gaming terbaru",
    "meta_keywords": "laptop,gaming,high performance",
    "meta_description": "Beli laptop gaming pro dengan performa terbaik",
    "meta_title": "Laptop Gaming Pro - Performa Maksimal",
    "weight": 2.5,
    "type_weight": "KG",
    "size_long": 35,
    "size_tall": 25,
    "size_wide": 2,
    "type_size": "CM",
    "sort": 1,
    "tags": "gaming,laptop,technology",
    "status": "PUBLISH"
}

request.description: Create a new product. Product ID will be stored in product_id variable.

Delete a product by ID

item.name: Category Products API

request.description: Get all product-category relationships
Get all categories for a specific product

exec: console.log('✓ Product category created with ID: ' + response.data.id);

request.description: Attach a single category to a product
Attach multiple categories to a product at once
Detach multiple categories from a product
Get a specific product-category relationship
Update a product-category relationship
Delete a product-category relationship

item.name: User Management

request.description: Get all users with their roles and permissions

exec: console.log('✓ User created with ID: ' + response.data.id);

request.description: Create new user with roles. If no roles provided, default 'User' role is assigned.
Get single user with roles and permissions
Get all available roles and their permissions
Get user roles and permissions
Assign a role to user. Available roles: Super Admin, Admin, Manager, User
Remove a role from user
Replace all user roles with new roles (sync)
Update user profile and roles. All fields are optional. Roles will be synced if provided.
Delete a user. Cannot delete the first admin user (ID: 1).

item.description: Complete CRUD operations for user management with role assignment and profile editing. Includes create user, update user profile with roles, delete user, and role/permission operations.

request.description: Get all roles with pagination
Search roles by name
Get single role by ID
Get all permissions for a specific role

exec: console.log('✓ Role created with ID: ' + response.data.id);

request.description: Create a new role with permissions
Update role and its permissions
Delete a role (cannot delete system roles)

item.description: Complete CRUD operations for role management with permission assignment

Get all permissions without pagination
Get permissions grouped by module (products, users, etc)
Get permissions for specific module (replace 'products' with module name)
Search permissions by name
Get single permission by ID

exec: console.log('✓ Permission created with ID: ' + response.data.id);

request.description: Create a new permission

variable.description: Base URL untuk API. Ubah sesuai dengan URL aplikasi Anda.
Bearer token dari login (akan diisi otomatis setelah login)
ID user yang sedang login (diisi otomatis)
Category ID untuk testing. Default: 1 (Teknologi). Update sesuai kebutuhan.
Blog ID untuk testing. Default: 1. Update sesuai kebutuhan atau akan terisi otomatis setelah create.
Product ID untuk testing. Default: 1. Update sesuai kebutuhan atau akan terisi otomatis setelah create.
Taxonomy Type ID untuk testing. Default: 1. Update sesuai kebutuhan.
Taxonomy List ID untuk testing. Default: 1. Update sesuai kebutuhan.
Product Variant ID untuk testing. Default: 1. Update sesuai kebutuhan.
Product Image ID untuk testing. Default: 1. Update sesuai kebutuhan.
Product Price ID untuk testing. Default: 1. Update sesuai kebutuhan.
User email untuk testing (diisi otomatis saat register)
Role ID untuk testing. Default: 1. Update sesuai kebutuhan atau akan terisi otomatis setelah create.
Permission ID untuk testing. Default: 1. Update sesuai kebutuhan atau akan terisi otomatis setelah create.
